MINI MINUTES: Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: N. Wong; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Herbert Lew is present in Pro Per.
Defendant Francisco Murica is present in Pro Per.

The Judge Pro Tem Rebecca Grey litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of March 09, 2020 is vacated.
